_description: ESPN team/player stats for Switzerland (3 group + R32 vs ALG) and Colombia (3 group + R32 vs GHA) — R16 SUI vs COL 2026-07-07/08

r32_vs_algeria.note: SUI dominated; scored 2 in regulation. Detailed ESPN match stats not captured — see matches/Switzerland_vs_Algeria/. SUI had high SOT (estimated 7+) consistent with group form.

elo_progression.note: ELO updated from pre-WC base using K=60 and WFE formula; WC2026 results not yet in elo_current_ratings.csv

dan_ndoye.wc2026_shots: top shooter vs QAT (6) and BIH (4); lower vs CAN (2)
dan_ndoye.goals_assists_estimate: 1-2 goals in WC2026 based on shot volume
dan_ndoye.note: Ndoye is SUI's most dangerous winger; scores and assists regularly

breel_embolo.note: Primary target man. Shot-on-target rate high in open matches; reduced when SUI defending deep (vs CAN).

granit_xhaka.note: Deep-lying playmaker, rarely makes final third shots. Not a scorer question.

notes: SOT very consistent at 7 in first 2 games — drops sharply when defending deep (4 vs dominant CAN)
Vs COL (favored), expect SUI SOT in 4-6 range — adjusted lambda 4.5-5.0
SUI corners highest vs open opponents (10 vs QAT away). Vs COL who also attacks, corners likely moderate 4-6.
SUI conceded only 2 goals in 4 WC2026 matches — solid defensive structure
Dan Ndoye is the player most likely to score; Embolo is the most likely SOT accumulator

r32_vs_ghana.note: Colombia 1-0 Ghana. COL controlled game; limited ESPN detailed stats captured. Corners estimated ~4.

luis_diaz.wc2026_g_a: 1 goal, 1 assist in group stage (excl. R32)
luis_diaz.note: COL's most dangerous attacker; Liverpool pedigree; high involvement in attacks

jhon_arias.note: Active in transitions; goal/assist probability moderate. Less info on his WC2026 specific production.

james_rodriguez.note: 0 goals, 0 assists in all 3 group games despite starting every game. Market tends to overestimate James due to name recognition.

daniel_munoz.note: 2 WC2026 goals including the 1-0 winner vs CDR. Attacks in from right flank.

notes: COL's shot volume is very high (15-24 per game); SOT avg 6.33 in groups
COL's corners avg 4.67; expect 4-5 vs SUI who defend compactly
James Rodriguez: 0 G/0A in 3 group games — apply RULE9 discount if market prices him generously
COL's offense converted poorly vs Portugal (24 shots, 0 goals) — finishing inconsistency
Offsides notably elevated; COL plays high offensive line (avg 4.33/game)
